def print_header(labels: list[str]):
    col_w = 16
    header = f"{'Metric':<25s}"
    for lbl in labels:
        header += f"{lbl:>{col_w}s}"
    if len(labels) >= 2:
        header += f"{'Delta':>{col_w}s}"
    print(header)
    print("-" * len(header))
